subcategory: Animated statistics showcase with 3D tilt cards
use_cases: Displaying company growth metrics with animated counters on landing pages
Showcasing platform scale capabilities with interactive stat cards
Creating engaging hero sections with scroll-triggered number animations
Presenting business KPIs with 3D perspective card effects
Building trust through animated statistics in marketing sections
ai_summary: A dynamic hero section component featuring animated counter statistics with 3D perspective tilt cards. Uses Framer Motion for scroll-triggered animations and mouse-tracking rotate effects, creating an engaging statistics showcase with Icons (Database, Users, Globe, ShieldCheck). Perfect for SaaS landing pages to display platform scale metrics with premium, interactive visual effects.
